Transparent LED Displays

INV Series

The Pinnacle of Invisible Display Technology

Ultra-transparency with lightweight, smart, and ultra-thin design. Specifically engineered for modern architecture with flexible panels.

Key Features

80-90% Transparency
Flexible Panels
High Contrast
Seamless Screen
Custom Sizes

Technical Specifications

SpecificationI3MI6MI3H
Installation MethodGlass MountingGlass MountingHanging
Pixel Pitch3.91mm6.25mm3.91mm
Brightness3,500nits4,500nits3,500nits
Transparency Rate80%90%80%
Weight/㎡6kg5kg38kg
IP RateIP31IP31IP31
Lifespan>100,000 hrs>100,000 hrs>100,000 hrs
Warranty2 Years2 Years2 Years

*All specifications subject to change without notice. Other pixel pitches available on request.
